title: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei vows protection of Iran's nuclear missile capabilities
summary: Iran's supreme leader stated that the Islamic Republic will protect its nuclear and missile capabilities as a national asset. The remarks underscore Tehran's resolve amid ongoing negotiations and military pressures.[5]
contents:
# Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei vows protection of Iran's nuclear missile capabilities

## Overview
Iran's supreme leader stated that the Islamic Republic will protect its nuclear and missile capabilities as a national asset. The remarks underscore Tehran's resolve amid ongoing negotiations and military pressures.[5]

## Details
Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei made the declaration on Thursday. It signals hardline positioning against concessions on nuclear or missile programs. The statement likely responds to US demands in ceasefire talks. IRGC forces have remained regenerating missile stockpiles post-conflict. Protection efforts include reorganizing degraded missile and drone units.[5]

**Location**: Tehran, Iran

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @IranSpec, which covers Iran nuclear program IRGC missile satellite imagery technical. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Iran nuclear program IRGC missile satellite imagery technical will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
